name: ambient-qwen3-asr
description: Local Qwen3-ASR speech-to-text provider for Ambient push-to-talk.

env.name: AMBIENT_QWEN3_ASR_BINARY
env.description: Optional llama-mtmd-cli command or absolute path. Ambient can bind this during STT provider repair.

env.name: AMBIENT_QWEN3_ASR_MODEL
env.description: Optional custom llama.cpp -hf model ref for explicit experiments. Defaults use the bundled checksum-pinned asset manifest.

env.name: AMBIENT_QWEN3_ASR_ASSET_DIR
env.description: Optional cache root for verified Qwen3-ASR model and projector assets.

qwen3_asr_transcribe.description: Transcribe a normalized WAV utterance to Ambient STT JSON using Qwen3-ASR 0.6B.
